doc_title_en: Notice of Status of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Completion of Acquisition Program

key_facts.reason_jp: 定款第37条に基づく自己株式取得

name_jp: 王子ホールディングス
summary_en: 9,057,600 shares acquired for ¥7.536B (ToSTNeT-3 market purchase, 1 May–19 May 2026). Cumulative to date under 16 Dec 2025 board resolution: 57,196,900 shares for ¥49.999B of ¥50B authorization (9.0% S/O limit). Program now closed. Year-to-date (FY24–FY27) ¥100B of ¥150B three-year plan completed; remaining ¥50B to be executed based on stock price and market conditions.
summary_jp: 9,057,600株を75億3,624万円で取得（ToSTNeT-3市場買付、5月1日～19日）。2025年12月16日決議による累計：57,196,900株、499億9,993万円（上限50億円）。本プログラム終了。中期計画FY24～27累計100億円完了（上限150億円）、残50億円は株価・市場環境を勘案し実施予定。
tag_en: Buyback Progress - 9,058k shares (1.0% S/O) - ¥7.54B - completion notice within FY26 authorization
tag_jp: 自己株式取得進捗 - 905万8千株（発行済の1.0%）- 75億3,624万円 - FY26認可枠内で完了
